payload.summary: Planned a CLI-fallback recovery mechanism for the in-process multi-vendor review converge() API. The in-process flow loses vendor findings on synthesis failure; the CLI's existing per-vendor on-disk checkpoint pattern survives such failures. Selected Approach 1 (auto-fallback to CLI subprocess + reuse .review-cache/ layout + observable recovery via two new ConvergenceResult fields).

decisions.title: Subprocess fallback over native checkpoint-then-synthesize
decisions.rationale: Reuses the existing consensus_synthesizer.py CLI binary verbatim instead of forking synthesis logic. Future synthesizer fixes inherit automatically; no two-path divergence risk.

decisions.title: Reuse .review-cache/ layout used by review_dispatcher.py CLI
decisions.rationale: Same directory, filenames, and manifest format as the CLI dispatcher. Eliminates path translation and a second loader; the fallback subprocess reads checkpoint files without any conversion.

decisions.title: Observable recovery via two ConvergenceResult fields
decisions.rationale: recovered_via_fallback: bool + fallback_diagnostics: dict | None directly on the dataclass. Side-channels (env var, thread-local, audit-only) hide recovery from callers that legitimately need to know.

decisions.title: Re-raise original synthesis exception when fallback also fails
decisions.rationale: Subprocess stderr tail attaches as forensic data (Python 3.11+ __notes__) but the surface exception is the original synthesis error, since that is the diagnostically interesting one.

decisions.title: Audit emission failures do not mask recovery
decisions.rationale: Coordinator unavailability when emitting convergence.fallback_recovered must not un-recover a successful recovery. Wrap in try/except + logger.warning. Mirrors coordination-bridge convention.

next_steps: wp-contracts is the root package — JSON Schemas validating .review-cache/ layout. Then wp-checkpoint-helper. wp-cli-refactor and wp-converge-recovery follow the DAG; wp-integration is final.
After this proposal lands, file the follow-up bug fix proposal for consensus_synthesizer.py:59 line_range type handling (referenced in proposal.md and tasks.md Phase 8.3).

relevant_files.description: Approved proposal — selected Approach 1 (auto-fallback to CLI subprocess)
Architecture, decision log, component-interaction diagrams, edge cases
TDD-ordered tasks across Phases 0-8, mapped to spec scenarios
5 ADDED requirements: checkpoint layout, in-process checkpointing, CLI fallback, observability fields, audit logging
5 packages: wp-contracts -> wp-checkpoint-helper -> wp-cli-refactor -> wp-converge-recovery -> wp-integration
